required_patterns.description: Prompt must identify the output as a production document rather than a single illustration.
Prompt must lock the output to a single-page document layout.
Prompt must include a dedicated camera map or blocking guide section.
Prompt must include a storyboard preview section rather than only one hero image.

forbidden_patterns.description: Poster language can collapse the layout into a single-key-art composition.
Moodboard language can weaken the structured production-document layout.
The beat sheet must not reduce itself to one main illustration.

manual_review_triggers.description: Floorplan wording can imply geometric precision the source data does not support.
manual_review_triggers.review_question: 这里的 floorplan 是符号化 blocking guide，还是会暗示精确空间俯视图？

manual_review_triggers.description: Eyeline vector language can over-claim spatial certainty.
manual_review_triggers.review_question: 这里的 eyeline vectors 是简化示意，还是在要求模型发明精确空间关系？
